channel.title: Metal on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Metal on Arrans github.io

item.title: cocos/cocos-engine
item.description: Cocos simplifies game creation and distribution with Cocos Creator, a free, open-source, cross-platform game engine. Empowering millions of developers to create high-performance, engaging 2D/3D games and instant web entertainment.

item.title: hybridgroup/yzma
item.description: Go with your own intelligence - Go applications that directly integrate llama.cpp for local inference using hardware acceleration.
